title: Artificial Orchid in Cement Pot, 13 Realistic Phalaenopsis Flowers with 3 Stems, 18" Tall Faux Orchid Arrangement for Home Decor/Office/Wedding Decor (White)
features: 【🎯 Ultra-Stable Cement Planter Design】18-inch premium faux orchid features a 3.4-inch weighted cement pot (3x heavier than plastic planters) that won't tip over - pet and kid proof!

【🌸 Premium & Realistic Design】Petals are crafted from Premium Materials,Total 13 lifelike flowers (2.6-3.1" diameter) across 3 stems with natural veining and color gradients - more dimensional than silk alternatives!
【💝 Luxury Gift-Ready】Elegantly boxed as symbol of nobility and good fortune. Perfect for: Housewarming,Mother's Day,Weddings,Corporate Events.
【🧼 Zero-Maintenance Perfection】Dust-resistant surfaces wipe clean easily. Bendable stems allow custom shaping. No pollen or fading - easier than real orchids!
【📦 Flawless Delivery Guarantee】Flowers are pre-assembled in the pots—ready to display upon arrival, no assembly required! elevate your space with timeless elegance.
description: Why This Outshines Real Orchids Say goodbye to wilting flowers - Our faux orchids stay perpetually pristine without water or sunlight: Botanical Accuracy ✔ 13 lifelike flowers across 3 arching stems ✔ petals are crafted from advanced flexible polymer-coated textile - looks more vivid and realistic than traditional silk flowers ✔ Reinforced PVC stems hold blooms at perfect angles ✔ Durable cement planter resists knocking over ✔ Pre-planted in pots—just unbox and decorate! Designer-Worthy Styling Pair with LED fairy lights for evening ambiance Office status symbol that impresses clients Wedding centerpiece that lasts beyond the event Includes: 1 artificial orchid plant (13 flowers) Durable cement planter with polished little stone embellishments
